data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of group coordination for split payments. However, the evidence does not demonstrate any API or functionality that explicitly supports this requirement. The linked use case mentions split payments, but there is no concrete evidence of how this is implemented or validated through API reads or persisted state checks.
gaps: No evidence of an API or functionality for group coordination (split payments).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
